infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GetDraft needs access to your photos so you can showcase your athletic profile and add highlight reels.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GetDraft saves selected photos to your profile.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GetDraft uses the camera to capture profile photos, scan guardian QR codes, and record your guardian declaration video.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GetDraft uses the microphone to record your guardian declaration video.

plugins.photosPermission: GetDraft needs access to your photos so you can showcase your athletic profile and add highlight reels.
plugins.cameraPermission: GetDraft uses the camera to capture profile photos and highlight clips.
GetDraft uses the camera to scan QR codes for guardian linking and to record your guardian declaration video.
plugins.microphonePermission: GetDraft uses the microphone to record your guardian declaration video.
